name: Nextbots: Backrooms Sandbox
description: Now the sandbox is in space! You start playing on a space military base located on an asteroid! Guns are scattered around the meteorite, pick them up to shoot back at monsters! Summon enemies with a portal gun! Collect points and become the first on the leaderboard, compete with your friends! Enjoy the game!
instructions: Your task is to destroy as many monsters as possible Collect points and get to the first place in the leaderboard Enjoy the game
tags: 1 Player, Android, Shooter, Shooting, War, Warrior
